Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}You're finally here, {f 4 2}-chan! We've been waiting for you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I wanted to tell you the good news as soon as possible. It's about a customer who came by earlier...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Who do you think it was? Here's a hint: "signature."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 13 6 5 103}Wow! I'm impressed! I thought that hint might have been too vague...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}But yes, it was one of the organizers of the campaign to save the persimmon tree.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 13 6 5 103}That's right! How'd you guess!? One of my fans came by. He said he'd bring the rest of the fan club next time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Yeah, I wish! Actually, it was one of the organizers of the campaign to save the persimmon tree.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}He said, "Let's protect the tree together!"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}He's already gathered a number of signatures from students who were in our son's class![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 104 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Everyone's banding together to honor the memory of our son...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Of course! He was our proud son![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 104 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I'm sure he's just as happy as we are...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}All right! {f 4 2}-chan, let's go to Gekkoukan right now![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I have to tell my son the good news![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I've never been so excited to go for a walk before![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 5 13 6 15 103}Don't flake on me now! You're the one who made this happen, right? You must take part in the ceremony![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}I've never been so excited to go for a walk before![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The elderly couple is showing[n]their affection for me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're growing closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Let's race to the persimmon tree! I won't lose—not even to a youngster like you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}All right, dear, we'll be back. Thanks for watching the store![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The school was closed, but we climbed[n]over the gate and visited the tree...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I visited the tree with Bunkichi-san[n]and then returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
